description_long: This is a small, round cactus plant with a segmented, ribbed green body adorned with short, white spines evenly distributed along its ridges. Atop the cactus sits a single, large, flat flower with a dark purple center and pink-tipped petals arranged in a circular pattern. The plant is housed in a classic terracotta pot, which is unadorned and has a slightly flared rim. The pot's surface is matte and earthy brown, contrasting with the vibrant green of the cactus. The cactus appears healthy and robust, with a symmetrical form and a prominent, decorative flower. There are no visible labels, decorations, or additional elements on the pot.
description: A round, ribbed green cactus with white spines and a large pink-and-purple flower, set in a plain terracotta pot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cactus's ribbed body, white spines, and the full face of the pink-and-purple flower atop the plant.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view revealing more of the cactus's right side and the flower's petal arrangement.
description_view_2: Another angled view highlighting the left side of the cactus and the symmetry of the spines and flower.
description_view_3: Back view showing the rear ribs and spines of the cactus, with the flower's petals visible from behind.
